title: x402 Micropayments — Pay Per Request with USDC
excerpt: x402 is an HTTP-native micropayment protocol. Instead of managing API keys, billing accounts, or subscriptions, simply pay per request with USDC on Base chain.
content: x402 is an HTTP-native micropayment protocol. Instead of managing API keys, billing accounts, or subscriptions, simply pay per request with USDC on Base chain. Call any premium endpoint, get HTTP 402 with payment instructions, send the exact amount in USDC, retry with the transaction hash.
